author: Dean Best
title: CCEP may face fresh Germany strikes, union warns
description: Industrial action has been held this week at Coca-Cola Europacific Partners sites across Germany amid a pay dispute.
content:
Coca-Cola Europacific Partners staff in Germany could walk out again amid a dispute over pay, union officials have warned.

title: C. elegans SAS-1 ensures centriole integrity and ciliary function, and operates with SSNA-1
